return(function(N,B,I,K,P,y,Q,k,a,u,s,M,G,v,w,L,d,Z,A,U,W,E,H)v,A,H,W,G,s,U,a,w,Z,k,d,u,M,L,E=function(N)w[N]=w[N]-(-397880-(-397881))if w[N]==-438882-(-438882)then w[N],U[N]=nil,nil end B=a(f)local I=function()return d(N,{},f,B)end return I end,function(N,f)local B=a(f)local I=function(I,K,P,y,Q,U,w)return d(N,{I;K,P;y,Q;U,w},f,B)end return I end,function(N,f)local B=a(f)local I=function(...)return d(N,{...},f,B)end return I end return(E(11477570-(-462063),{}))(B(Q))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[f(-991657+978964)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
